00020 
00027 #ifndef JELATINE_THREAD_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_THREAD_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "method.h"
00033 
00034 /******************************************************************************
00035  * Native threads wrapper type definitions                                    *
00036  ******************************************************************************/
00037 
00050 #if JEL_THREAD_POSIX
00051 #   ifdef TLS
00052 typedef void *native_key_t;
00053 #   else
00054 typedef pthread_key_t native_key_t;
00055 #   endif // TLS
00056 typedef pthread_t native_thread_t;
00057 typedef pthread_mutex_t native_mutex_t;
00058 typedef pthread_cond_t native_cond_t;
00059 #elif JEL_THREAD_PTH
00060 typedef pth_key_t native_key_t;
00061 typedef pth_t native_thread_t;
00062 typedef pth_mutex_t native_mutex_t;
00063 typedef pth_cond_t native_cond_t;
00064 #else
00065 typedef void *native_key_t;
00066 typedef int native_thread_t;
00067 typedef int native_mutex_t;
00068 typedef int native_cond_t;
00069 #endif
00070 
00075 #ifdef TLS
00076 #   define JEL_TLS TLS
00077 #else
00078 #   define JEL_TLS
00079 #endif // TLS
00080 
00081 /******************************************************************************
00082  * Native threads wrapper inlined functions                                   *
00083  ******************************************************************************/
00084 
00089 static inline void *native_key_get(native_key_t key)
00090 {
00091 #if JEL_THREAD_POSIX
00092 #   ifdef TLS
00093     return key;
00094 #else
00095     return pthread_getspecific(key);
00096 #endif // TLS
00097 #elif JEL_THREAD_PTH
00098     return pth_key_getdata(key);
00099 #else
00100     return key;
00101 #endif
00102 } // native_key_get()
00103 
00108 static inline void native_key_set(native_key_t *key, void *value)
00109 {
00110 #if JEL_THREAD_POSIX
00111 #   ifdef TLS
00112     *key = value;
00113 #   else
00114     pthread_setspecific(*key, value);
00115 #   endif // TLS
00116 #elif JEL_THREAD_PTH
00117     pth_key_setdata(*key, value);
00118 #else
00119     *key = value;
00120 #endif
00121 } // native_key_set()
00122 
00123 /******************************************************************************
00124  * Type definitions                                                           *
00125  ******************************************************************************/
00126 
00129 struct stack_frame_t {
00130     struct class_t *cl; 
00131     method_t *method; 
00132     const uint8_t *pc; 
00133     jword_t *locals; 
00134 };
00135 
00137 typedef struct stack_frame_t stack_frame_t;
00138 
00140 #define THREAD_TMP_ROOTS (2)
00141 
00144 struct thread_t {
00145     struct thread_t *next; 
00146     bool blocked; 
00147     bool stopped; 
00148 
00149     uintptr_t obj; 
00150 
00151     jword_t *stack; 
00152     jword_t *sp; 
00153     stack_frame_t *fp; 
00154     const uint8_t *pc; 
00155 
00156     uintptr_t exception; 
00157 
00158     struct {
00159 #if !NDEBUG
00160         const char *file; 
00161         int line; 
00162 #endif // !NDEBUG
00163         uintptr_t data; 
00164         char *description; 
00165         jmp_buf *buf; 
00166     } c_exception; 
00167 
00168     struct {
00169         uint16_t capacity; 
00170         uint16_t used; 
00171         uintptr_t **pointers; 
00172     } roots; 
00173 
00174     native_thread_t native;  
00175     native_cond_t cond; 
00176     native_cond_t *cond_int; 
00177     bool interrupted; 
00178 
00179 #if JEL_PRINT
00180     size_t call_depth; 
00181 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00182 };
00183 
00185 typedef struct thread_t thread_t;
00186 
00187 /******************************************************************************
00188  * Globals                                                                    *
00189  ******************************************************************************/
00190 
00191 extern JEL_TLS native_key_t self;
00192 
00193 /******************************************************************************
00194  * Thread manager interface                                                   *
00195  ******************************************************************************/
00196 
00197 extern void tm_init( void );
00198 extern void tm_teardown( void );
00199 extern void tm_register(thread_t *);
00200 extern void tm_unregister(thread_t *);
00201 extern uint32_t tm_active( void );
00202 extern void tm_mark( void );
00203 extern void tm_purge( void );
00204 
00205 #if !JEL_THREAD_NONE
00206 extern void tm_lock();
00207 extern void tm_unlock();
00208 extern void tm_stop_the_world( void );
00209 #else // JEL_THREAD_NONE
00210 static inline void tm_lock( void ) {}
00211 static inline void tm_unlock( void ) {}
00212 static inline void *tm_get_lock( void ) { return NULL; }
00213 static inline void tm_stop_the_world( void ) {}
00214 #endif // !JEL_THREAD_NONE
00215 
00216 /******************************************************************************
00217  * Monitor interface                                                          *
00218  ******************************************************************************/
00219 
00220 extern void monitor_init( void );
00221 extern void monitor_enter(thread_t *, uintptr_t);
00222 extern bool monitor_exit(thread_t *, uintptr_t);
00223 
00224 /******************************************************************************
00225  * Thread interface                                                           *
00226  ******************************************************************************/
00227 
00228 extern void thread_push_root(uintptr_t *);
00229 extern void thread_pop_root( void );
00230 extern void thread_init(thread_t *);
00231 extern uintptr_t thread_create_main(thread_t *, method_t *, uintptr_t *);
00232 extern void thread_sleep(int64_t);
00233 
00234 #if !JEL_THREAD_NONE
00235 
00236 extern void thread_launch(uintptr_t *, method_t *);
00237 extern void thread_may_block( void );
00238 extern void thread_resumes( void );
00239 extern void thread_interrupt(thread_t *);
00240 extern void thread_yield( void );
00241 extern void thread_join(uintptr_t *);
00242 extern bool thread_wait(uintptr_t, uint64_t, uint32_t);
00243 extern bool thread_notify(uintptr_t, bool);
00244 
00245 #else // JEL_THREAD_NONE
00246 
00247 static inline void thread_launch(uintptr_t ref, method_t *run)
00248 {
00249     return;
00250 } // thread_launch()
00251 
00252 static inline void thread_may_block( void ) {}
00253 static inline void thread_resumes( void ) {}
00254 
00255 static inline void thread_yield( void ) {}
00256 static inline void thread_join(uintptr_t *thread) {}
00257 
00258 static inline bool thread_wait(uintptr_t ref, uint64_t millis, uint32_t nanos)
00259 {
00260     return true;
00261 } // thread_wait()
00262 
00263 static inline bool thread_notify(uintptr_t ref, bool broadcast)
00264 {
00265     return true;
00266 } // thread_notify()
00267 
00268 #endif
00269 
00270 /******************************************************************************
00271  * Thread inlined functions                                                   *
00272  ******************************************************************************/
00273 
00277 static inline thread_t *thread_self( void )
00278 {
00279     return native_key_get(self);
00280 } // thread_self()
00281 
00282 #endif // JELATINE_THREAD_H
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:38:46 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
